Import Figma designs into the SDD pipeline.

**Figma URL:** [PASTE FIGMA LINK]
**Feature to map to:** [FEATURE NUMBER or "new"]

Extract UI requirements from the design and map them to EARS-notation requirements in SPECIFICATION.md.

## Output

Output concisely: return only the artifact path(s), validation status, next required action, and any critical findings or blockers. Do not narrate the process steps.
